articles.title: UMass Lowell soccer player killed in Ohio car crash
articles.description:
"Toby was everything you hope for in a student-athlete and an even better person," his head coach at UMass Lowell wrote.

The post UMass Lowell soccer player killed in Ohio car crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: UMass Lowell soccer player Toby died in a car crash in Ohio.
His head coach praised him as an exemplary student-athlete and person.
The tragedy impacts the UMass Lowell community and Boston sports culture.

articles.title: Immigration agent fatally shot a man in Houston during an enforcement operation, authorities say
articles.description:
The Department of Homeland Security said in a statement that the man, a Mexican national, ignored commands to stop and attempted to ram an agent who fired his weapon in self-defense.

The post Immigration agent fatally shot a man in Houston during an enforcement operation, authorities say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Immigration agent shot a Mexican national during an enforcement operation in Houston.
The man ignored commands and attempted to ram the agent, prompting self-defense.
Boston residents may see increased scrutiny and discussions on immigration enforcement policies.

articles.title: Co-owner of Maine lumber mill dies weeks after fire, explosion that killed 2 others
articles.description:
Alden J. Robbins' death follows those of a firefighter, who died while battling the blaze, and the assistant chief of a local fire department, who died about a month after from his injuries.

The post Co-owner of Maine lumber mill dies weeks after fire, explosion that killed 2 others appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alden J. Robbins, co-owner of a Maine lumber mill, has died following a recent fire.
Two others, including a firefighter and an assistant fire chief, also died from the incident.
This tragedy highlights safety concerns for Boston's lumber industry and emergency responders.

articles.title: Plymouth DA seeks assault and battery charge against Brockton mayor
articles.description:
The DA's office says it filed for a clerk-magistrate hearing, which comes weeks after a high school student accused the mayor of inappropriately touching her during a parade.

The post Plymouth DA seeks assault and battery charge against Brockton mayor appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Plymouth DA filed for a hearing against Brockton Mayor Bill Carpenter for assault and battery.
Accusation stems from an incident involving a high school student during a parade.
Potential legal proceedings could impact Carpenter's position and community trust in local leadership.
